race.comment: THIRTY DEGREES (10) showed good tactical speed first-up at Scone but just lacked a fitness edge late when finishing third. Has enough dash to offset the wide alley and should prove tougher to reel in this time. BALLADORAN (4) steps pit on debut for the Robb yard and showed enough in her recent trial to suggest she can make an immediate impact. FORTIANS (14) was in contention on the bend and ran a better race last start to finish third over 1200m at Warren after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Backs up quickly but will need a smart steer from the wide alley. JACK THE BOSS (8) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.5 lengths from the winner in second over 1200m at Warren. Another forward showing is anticipated.
